data.title: Galleri Blæst, the Joy of Art
data.description:
![](/uploads/1574-theres-a-crack-in-everything-statement2.jpg)*"There´s a crack in everything" that´s how the light gets in"*

Solo udstilling med Grethe Mariann Maurseth oliemalerier til og med 23.10 [there´s a crack in everything, statement2](/uploads/1511-theres-a-crack-in-everything-statement2-2.pdf)
